user.title: Connect to DeepSeek
user.description:
Enter your DeepSeek API key to connect.

You can get an API key from [DeepSeek Platform](https://platform.deepseek.com/api-keys).

options.title: Configure DeepSeek
options.description:
Configure DeepSeek model and parameters.

Learn more about available models at [DeepSeek API Docs](https://platform.deepseek.com/api-docs).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate DeepSeek
reauth_confirm.description: Your DeepSeek API key is invalid or expired. Please enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DeepSeek API. Please check your internet connection and API key.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your DeepSeek API key.

chat.name: Chat
chat.description: Send a message to DeepSeek and get a response.

message.name: Message
message.description: The message to send to DeepSeek.

conversation_id.name: Conversation ID
conversation_id.description: Optional conversation ID for maintaining context.

max_length.name: Max Length
max_length.description: Maximum length of summary in words.
